title: trasus tomentosus
intro: Trasus tomentosus, also known as the Woolly Trasus, is a plant species in the genus Trasus, characterized by its soft, woolly leaves and stems. The medicinal properties of Trasus tomentosus include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Trasus tomentosus typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from its leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
